notes: Initial calibration values based on Open-Meteo model accuracy analysis

europe.notes: European models (ECMWF, ICON) more accurate for EU cities. Lower sigma = higher confidence.

us.notes: GFS primary for US, slightly less accurate than ECMWF for short-term. Higher sigma = lower confidence.

ecmwf_ifs025.name: ECMWF IFS
ecmwf_ifs025.notes: Best global model, 9km resolution, excellent for Europe

icon_global.name: DWD ICON
icon_global.notes: DWD ICON, 13km resolution, excellent for Europe and Central EU

gfs_global.name: NOAA GFS
gfs_global.notes: NOAA GFS, 13km resolution, best for US, decent globally

meteofrance_arpege_world.name: Meteo France ARPEGE
meteofrance_arpege_world.notes: Meteo France, variable resolution, good for Western Europe

gem_global.name: GEM Global
gem_global.notes: Canadian model, 15km resolution, good global coverage

calibration_schedule.notes: Recalibrate sigma values weekly based on actual vs forecast performance
